text_preview:
JUNE 4th, 1989. Recife, Pernambuco. Internal military correspondence communicating the reporting of a UFO sighting in that region.

“DEPARTMENT OF FLIGHT PROTECTION  OF RECIFE – AREA CONTROL CENTER

## Recife, 06 June 89.

## From: the Chief

## To : Chief of DPV-RFA

## Subject: Transcription of occurrence

I – I transcribe for the proper purposes, occurrence contained in the ACC Recife Record Book, on 06/04/89, shift 15: 00/21: 15 UTC.

II – It was reported by PT L317 SBSV / SBSP F350, the presence of a UFO, flying in the same direction, position two-hours, approximately at 05 (five) NM (nau
summary: On June 4, 1989, a pilot reported a strong mobile blue light flying alongside at FL100 near Recife-PE; documented in internal military ACC correspondence.
